name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: A tactic that hasn't been used since 1787
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c62db/24c69fd9/86c36b1a/189ce886/3015976/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ27N_digital_email_20171016_ConConHistory_inact&source=WQEFEJ27N_digital_email_20171016_ConConHistory_inact")
---

Peter,

Republicans are toying with a tactic that hasn't been used in more than 200 years:

They want to call a constitutional convention. And if they control two more state legislatures, they could do it without a single Democratic vote.

The last time this happened was 1787, when the founding fathers _actually wrote_ the Constitution.

Only by electing more Democrats to state legislatures can we stop this from happening.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who can flip state legislatures and stop Republicans from rewriting the Constitution.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c62db/24c69fd9/86c36b1a/189ce887/3015976/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171016_email_ConConHistory?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ27N_digital_email_20171016_ConConHistory_inact&source=WQEFEJ27N_digital_email_20171016_ConConHistory_inact")**

What Republicans are planning isn't just speculation. They're actually practicing.

Republicans have already held mock constitutional conventions in Virginia and Arizona. They're ready, and they know what's at stake.

But so do we.

We've endorsed 37 women running for state legislative seats all across the country. And there are dozens more to come, particularly in the 10 states where we're targeting Republican majorities.

**Donate $3 to stop Republicans' agenda to rewrite the Constitution:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Turn-State-Legislatures-Blue](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c62db/24c69fd9/86c36b1a/189ce880/3015976/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171016_email_ConConHistory?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgTurnStateLegisla&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ27N_digital_email_20171016_ConConHistory_inact&source=WQEFEJ27N_digital_email_20171016_ConConHistory_inact")**

Thank you,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Why You Should Care About Your Local School Board
body:
| | Your efforts could lead to lasting change
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fwhy-should-you-care-about-your-local-school-board%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171017_art_s1&n=1) To unsubscribe from Intersect, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171017_art_s1&n=2).
| Did you know that in 2017 nearly half of America’s 1,000 largest school districts are holding elections? Those elected school board members will represent over 10 million students throughout 34 states in the U.S. Yet, local school board elections are notorious for low voter turnout—**often just five or ten percent**. We can do better, and as Christians, we have a great opportunity to bring the influence of our faith into this important responsibility of educating our kids. We created this 3-part series on school boards elections to address some critical issues that every voter should consider in their local school board election. We will be releasing one a week for the next three weeks. Read the first article below.
* * *
**[Why Should You Care About Your Local School Board?](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fwhy-should-you-care-about-your-local-school-board%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171017_art_s1&n=3)** _By Ross Izard_ I think we often get caught up in the hype of state and national elections. We argue about the relative merits of candidates for president, Congress, and governor - and these are important conversations. But do you realize that you might likely influence your community more directly through your local school board? While the specific powers and responsibilities of school boards vary by state, a central theme is present: School boards provide an accessible way for parents, taxpayers, and citizens to make their voices heard in education policy, such as school choice, teacher selection, curricular content, and the values that schools uphold and teach to students. These matter, and they have the potential of influencing an entire generation. While state and federal lawmakers alone have the authority to pass and alter laws, school boards often have significant latitude when it comes to determining policy and procedures at the ground level. In some states, school boards are granted even more authority under state constitutional “local control” clauses. The authority to determine policy and direction in a school district makes school boards critical governing bodies for anyone interested in education-related issues. A great deal can be accomplished by talking directly to the elected bodies responsible for overseeing the actual operation of school districts themselves. Your efforts to influence your school board may not make the paper, but could lead to lasting change in your schools and community. Sometimes, these changes have broad and even national implications. For instance, in Douglas County, Colorado, a locally elected school board is currently the key decision-making body in perhaps the most important constitutional debate over parental choice in education in American history. Yes, your involvement does matter! There are numerous ways to get involved with your local school board. In many cases, board members make themselves directly accessible to members of the community via phone, email, or community meetings. Many others are active on social media. Citizens can also attend school board meetings, which nearly always allow for public comment directly to the board. And, of course, you can impact who sits on your school board by voting. This fall, over 700 school board seats are up for election, representing over 10% of K-12 kids in America. Remember, you can’t count on someone else to represent your views. If you aren’t there to speak up, chances are that no one else will—or that someone who believes something different will do so in your stead. So get out there and get involved!
* * *
_My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._
---

If you aren’t there to speak up, chances are that no one else will—or that someone who believes something different will do so in your stead. So get out there and get involved! My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics. * ©2017 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: The White House
subject: It's time to restore America's competitive edge
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9a3e066c77229420dc6f98c9e45df1a2ef7a5b55bfbe9521e3e39220d73bd966fd41bf821adc4ca6e55e082cad51175c5e9632813e406b0c

President Donald J. Trump is committed to fixing our broken tax system. The President is working to reform our tax system so that Americans are treated fairly and can keep more of their hard-earned money, and companies can bring jobs back to the United States. “We believe every-day Americans know better how to spend their own money than the federal bureaucracy, and we want to help them keep as much of that hard-earned money as we can,” said President Trump

-------------

President Trump Meets with Cabinet Members
Yesterday, President Trump and his Cabinet met at the White House to discuss critical domestic policy issues. The President highlighted the unemployment rate at an almost seventeen-year low, the stock market soaring to record levels, and GDP growth of more than three percent last quarter. However, America's broken tax code is costing us millions of jobs and trillions of dollars. It's time to restore America's competitive edge and pass historic tax cuts for the American people. “The economy cannot take off like it really has the potential to do unless we reduce the tax burden on the families, businesses, and workers of our country,” said the President.

See the President’s opening remarks
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9a3e066c7722942071776ea3dad7c5b787e438c5a9b4d9a165eaa2ff16e9f5c062a92f7a6f8154569bcb63359a334996fc76428b7906b301
here.

Unified Framework for Fixing our Broken Tax Code
President Donald J. Trump, the House of Representatives Ways and Means Committee, and the Senate Finance Committee are proposing vital tax relief to strengthen the middle class, grow the economy, and unleash America’s economic comeback. The America first tax relief plan includes:

- Tax relief for middle-class families
- The simplicity of “postcard” tax filing for the vast majority of Americans
- Ending incentive to ship jobs, capital, and tax revenue overseas
- Broadening the tax base and providing greater fairness for all Americans by closing loopholes

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9a3e066c77229420d2171650585127879b21223b2dc9f591a64873bde97b16fed64d3a015ed801fb154b7436887978326adee7f08b1ed0e3

Get the facts on what tax reform can do for American families, businesses, and manufacturers.

Vice President Talks Economy with Japan’s Deputy Prime Minister
Monday afternoon, Vice President Mike Pence met with Japan’s Deputy Prime Minister Tarō Asō in the Indian Treaty Room of the Eisenhower Executive Office Building for the second round of the U.S.-Japan Economic Dialogue. The Vice President traveled to Japan in April to launch the dialogue. Joined by Secretary of the Treasury Steven Mnuchin, Secretary of Commerce Wilbur Ross, US Trade Representative Bob Lighthizer, and US Ambassador to Japan Bill Hagerty, the Vice President stated, “We believe this dialogue has the potential to significantly deepen our bilateral economic ties, and produce jobs, prosperity, and growth on both sides of the pacific.” Next month, President Trump will be visiting Japan on his
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ff10a4298de2c5af885dc0f1609bdfa428e268a7109c7b8fb5400d2f3a3f965289345d1d50fca64ae92598c7e9ae25d1955ac694a1be6747
travels to Asia.
Read more
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ff10a4298de2c5af544d1cf9f34180c801e2600ae0276072ce39989f59ca93f7b8bc8ff4421365c67cedb67c9e1e023c1caa869e6e0907ca
here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump | October 16, 2017 (Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen)

POTUS AND VP TODAY

Today, President Trump welcomed Prime Minister Alexis Tsipras of Greece to the White House to discuss a range of bilateral and regional issues, including defense cooperation, economic investment, energy security, and the strong cultural ties that have bound Americans and Greeks together. After a working luncheon, they held a joint press conference from the Rose Garden.

In the afternoon, the President will participate in a Diwali ceremonial lighting of the Diya. Later, President Trump will deliver remarks on his “pro-growth, pro-jobs, pro-worker, pro-family, and pro-America” tax plan.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ff10a4298de2c5af044d111f58a8d86a0547580b35c5bc6a0a1f8c6b431c0db8562c1f16a6392d2d8975dd0a1222645be5d8cd024935b95c
Watch live at 7:10pm EST.

Vice President Pence is in Buffalo, New York, where he will meet with local businesses, community leaders, and families to discuss the need for tax reform that promotes American economic prosperity.

COMING UP

On Wednesday, Second Lady Karen Pence will be in Florida to announce her art therapy initiative, Art Therapy: Healing with the Heart.

On Friday, First Lady Melania Trump will present her inauguration gown to the Smithsonian. Designer Hervé Pierre will join the First Lady as the gown is added to the Smithsonian Museum of American History exhibit of inaugural dresses.

Contact the White House |

Unsubscribe

name: Debbie
subject: cruel and costly attack on women's health
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends, There is a range of issues that President Trump and his administration should focus on right now -- like expanding access to affordable health care, creating jobs, addressing climate change, or shoring up Social Security. But what they are focused on instead is **controlling women 's access to health care options.** The Trump administration issued an order that would allow employers to deny contraception and birth control to female employees for almost any reason. That's wrong. Period. A woman's decision about her body should ONLY be between her and her doctor. [_**Add your voice to mine and tell Trump and his administration to stop rolling back women 's rights.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e14/622b7b5b/6ab4988/307bd171/3395686201/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/womensrights/?code=wassermanschultz&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdwse1710bc%3Frecurring%3Dtrue%26amouynt%3D5") Birth control and other contraceptives are an important aspect of family planning and public health. They're even used to alleviate symptoms for a range of conditions such as endometriosis and Polycystic Ovary Syndrome. **Women should not have to suffer or go without recommended treatment because the President 's top priority is rolling back the rights of women.** This is nothing but a cruel and costly attack on women's health and women's rights. [_**Join me and condemn this reprehensible attack on women and our autonomy.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e14/622b7b5b/6ab4988/307bd171/3395686201/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/womensrights/?code=wassermanschultz&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdwse1710bc%3Frecurring%3Dtrue%26amouynt%3D5") Thank you, Debbie |

name: Team Donnelly
subject: "Gonna blow those exchanges up"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
The Trump/Pence Administration's decision last week to end crucial subsidy payments that stabilize the health care marketplaces is a big deal |
---

| | **He 's "Not gonna make the [subsidy] payments. That's gonna blow that thing up, gonna blow those exchanges up, right?" -- Steve Bannon
[Pitch in $5 now to fight Bannon's extremist agenda >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24f0/7377f838/34abd18a/51fb8a4a/3050367192/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-bannon?refcode=20171017ndb&amount=10")** Peter, the Trump/Pence Administration's decision last week to end crucial subsidy payments that stabilize the health care marketplaces is a _big deal_. These payments helped nearly 60% of low-income families afford health care through the Affordable Care Act. Without them, premiums will rise for these families by 20 percent. The damage to the Affordable Care Act may be irreparable. _Millions of Americans will lose their health care._

**And Steve Bannon is celebrating.** | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24f0/7377f838/34abd18a/51fb8a4a/3050367192/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-bannon?refcode=20171017ndb&amount=10")
---
I know it's hard to believe, but it's true. In a speech just this weekend, Bannon told supporters that withholding these crucial payments is a deliberate attempt to "blow up" the Affordable Care Act. He and his extremist allies don't care how many hard-working Americans are hurt in their quest for political gain.

Peter, we both know that this is unacceptable. From the beginning, Joe has been clear that Congress needs to work together to move healthcare forward. But if Bannon and his allies get their way, there will be nothing left to fix.

We need Joe in the Senate to fight back against extremists like Bannon who are more interested in dividing our nation than solving problems.

**Will you chip in today and keep Joe in the Senate to fight back against Bannon 's extremist agenda?**

name: Democrats.org
subject: It's my job to fact-check Donald Trump, Derek
body:
Demand a fair tax plan from the GOP.
---
**Americans deserve a tax plan that's fair for every household. Add your name to demand one from Congress:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Defeat-the-GOP-Tax-Plan1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20171017_ld2_nd2&source=em_20171017_ld2_nd2")**
I've been Research Director at DNC HQ for a few years now, and let me tell you something: Nothing has ever kept me on my toes quite like fact-checking Donald Trump. It's never-ending, Derek. We're talking about someone who has told over 1,300 blatant lies and misleading assertions in his first 270 days in the White House.

Take his tax plan, for instance: Trump went to Indianapolis a couple of weeks ago and said he wants to eliminate the estate tax to help out "millions" of farmers and small businesses.

But _PolitiFact_ rates his claim a "Pants on Fire" lie:

[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Defeat-the-GOP-Tax-Plan1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20171017_ld2_nd2&source=em_20171017_ld2_nd2")

Canceling the estate tax doesn't help millions of small businesses, Derek -- not even thousands. In fact, it only helps very wealthy families like Trump's and fewer than 100 businesses nationwide (all while the GOP plans to make middle-class families pay more).

We know Trump won't tell us the truth, but fact-checking him isn't enough. We need to make sure the Republicans in Congress who can stop him know where we stand.

**Add your name -- tell Congress to reject Trump's self-serving tax plan:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Defeat-the-GOP-Tax-Plan1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20171017_ld2_nd2&source=em_20171017_ld2_nd2")**
Thanks for helping out,

Lauren

Lauren Dillon
Research Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523bd3/4067b0a/440814ef2/7e65acfd/3573871434/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171017_ld2_nd2&source=em_20171017_ld2_nd2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523bd3/4067b0a/440814ef2/7e65acfa/3573871434/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171017_ld2_nd2&source=em_20171017_ld2_nd2"), or just reply to this email! name: Donna Edwards
subject: 250 by Thursday:
body:
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff5e/767134fb/5c2cad07/43381429/598366346/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171017-a")
We should always take on the fights that matter -- even when the odds are stacked against us.
That's why when big developers wanted to take over our riverfront and build in an irresponsible way, I organized with my friends and neighbors to force them to do so responsibly. We gathered, often in my living room, strategized -- and eventually won.
Together, we secured hundreds of good union jobs, 2,500 residential units, a hiking and biking trail along the river, and ample green space that ensured the space would benefit the whole community, not just the wealthy people building it.
**I 'm running for Prince George's County Executive to organize and build on that progress now. Will you stand with me? **
[**Change comes when we all stand together -- that 's why I'm asking for your help, right now. We've had a great response to our campaign so far -- over 125 grassroots contributors have stepped up -- but I'd like to double that to 250 by Thursday. Can you pitch in?**](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff5e/767134fb/5c2cad07/43381426/598366346/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171017-b")
For too long, we've been told one thing while our elected officials actually do what's in the best interest of the highest bidders. We can't be afraid to take on big developers or special interests to write a new destiny for our county.
That's why I'm not taking a dime from developers, to send the message that this campaign is about doing what's best for everyone.
**Opportunity should be equal for everyone no matter where you live in our community -- but that 's just not true right now. Will you help us change that?**
[**Make a contribution now and help us reach 250 grassroots contributors by Thursday. This would send a big message about the power of this team and the energy for change.**](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff5e/767134fb/5c2cad07/43381426/598366346/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171017-b")
Every campaign or change I've ever worked for started with an idea that grew into a movement. That's what we're doing here -- and I couldn't be more excited.
Thank you for everything,
Donna

**[Contribute](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff5e/767134fb/5c2cad07/43381426/598366346/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171017-b")**

name: Akilah Ensley
subject: Excited to work with you
body:
#
Team --
The first time I saw Andrew Gillum speak was at the DNC in 2016. I remember being impressed by his charisma -- he reminded me of another great leader. But it wasn't until I saw his [**announcement video**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3293/9e00690/4f9ba7b1/24031625/946345479/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171017-ae") a few months later that I fully grasped the need for leaders like Andrew in times like these.
**Even in Trump 's America, Andrew Gillum gives me hope for our future.**
And that's why so I'm excited to reach out to you today, as the newest member of the team working to elect Andrew Gillum as our next Governor of Florida. Because of your continued support, our momentum is growing across the state and nation -- and I firmly believe that we have a real opportunity to elect a true progressive champion here.
[**Will you join me on Team Gillum today by chipping in whatever you can afford to our campaign?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3293/9e00690/4f9ba7b1/24031625/946345479/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171017-ae")
Michael Starr Hopkins made a strong case for our campaign in _The Hill_ today, arguing that Andrew Gillum (along with Congressional candidate Randy "Iron Stache" Bryce) are "laying the blueprint for what the next generation of Democrats will look like":
_" Gillum is running for governor of Florida, an office that no African American in Florida has ever held. That doesn't appear to scare Gillum one bit. He has unapologetically criticized Republican Wisconsin Gov. Rick Scott and President Trump's response to issues like immigration, race relations, and repealing and replacing ObamaCare. Gillum recently endorsed the Medicaid for all proposal by Bernie Sanders. . . In a conservative leaning state like Florida, calling for the removal of Confederate statues in the middle of an election is a risky move, especially for someone building up name recognition. Gillum isn't shying away from decisions though. The former mayor has chosen to speak truth to power and ignore the political risks."_
Now more than ever, we need leaders like Andrew who are willing to take risks when it matters most -- to stand strong for our values no matter what. And as long as we're all willing to work together, and give this campaign our all, that's what we'll get when we win this election next November.
[**Can we count on you to make this kind of bold, progressive leadership possible in Florida, by chipping in to support our campaign today?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3293/9e00690/4f9ba7b1/24031625/946345479/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171017-ae")
I am so excited to see what we can accomplish together.
Bring it home,
Akilah Ensley
Finance Director
Gillum for Governor
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3293/9e00690/4f9ba7b1/24031625/946345479/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171017-ae")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3293/9e00690/4f9ba7b1/24031624/946345479/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3293/9e00690/4f9ba7b1/24031627/946345479/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3293/9e00690/4f9ba7b1/24031626/946345479/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
